history.qwen_observation: The upgrade_spring_boot_2_7 step failed because org.springframework.core.env.Profiles was removed in Spring Framework 5.3, causing compilation errors in WebConfigurer and LoggingAspect.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the intermediate UpgradeSpringBoot_2_7 step avoids the Spring Framework 5.3 Profiles removal issue. Jumping directly to UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 (which targets Java 17 and Spring Framework 6.x) leverages the meta-recipe's comprehensive migration logic, which typically handles legacy Spring Framework API removals and namespace changes in one pass.

history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade migrated imports to jakarta.* and Spring Security 6 APIs but failed to inject required dependencies (jakarta.annotation-api, thymeleaf-spring6), and the legacy Springfox dependency remains incompatible.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing Springfox dependencies first prevents classpath conflicts. A pom_patch step after the SB3 upgrade injects jakarta.annotation-api and thymeleaf-spring6, and forces their versions, resolving the missing package and symbol errors. The chain then continues with standard Java 17/21 plugin and source upgrades.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed during Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade due to missing jakarta.annotation dependencies, unresolved Profiles class, and missing thymeleaf-spring6 package.
history.qwen_rationale: Moved Jakarta API dependencies to a pom_patch step before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade so they are available on the classpath during recipe execution and subsequent compilation. Added UpgradeSpringFramework_5_3 to explicitly handle the removed Profiles utility class, and relied on UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 to migrate Spring Security 6 APIs and inject thymeleaf-spring6.

history.qwen_rationale: Removing the non-existent and disallowed recipes from the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade step will allow the recipe validation to pass. The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe handles the necessary framework upgrades and javax-to-jakarta migration internally, so no additional framework upgrade recipes are required.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed at upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 due to missing jakarta.annotation and thymeleaf-spring6 dependencies, plus unresolved Spring Framework 6.1/Security 6.1 API removals (Profiles, Customizer, EnableMethodSecurity).
history.qwen_rationale: Replaced the isolated SB3 upgrade with a composite step that chains UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3, UpgradeSpringFramework_6_1, and SpringBoot3BestPractices to systematically migrate namespaces and deprecated APIs. Explicitly added jakarta.annotation-api and thymeleaf-spring6 dependencies to bridge classpath gaps before compilation. Maintained the standard JDK 8→11→17→21 progression with plugin upgrades at each boundary to ensure incremental compatibility.
